  "findings": [
    "Shims missing under column base plate during erection",
    "Lack of proper bearing and leveling support prior to plumbing and grouting",
    "Potential instability of the column under load during erection"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt further erection of connected members on the affected column",
    "Install approved steel shims or leveling nuts to establish proper elevation and plumb",
    "Verify column alignment and stability before proceeding with bolt tensioning or grouting"
  ],
  "rationale": "Erecting structural steel columns without proper shims or leveling devices under the base plate violates AISC 303 and OSHA Subpart R stability requirements. It prevents accurate plumbing, compromises load distribution, and creates a collapse hazard during erection.",
  "references": [
    "AISC 303 Section 7.6",
    "OSHA 1926.755"
  ]
}
